top3.sql:
SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.AvgScrRead = (
    SELECT MAX(AvgScrRead)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM satscores s
JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.rtype = 'S'
ORDER BY s.AvgScrRead DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.AvgScrRead = (
    SELECT MAX(AvgScrRead)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM satscores s
JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.rtype = 'S'
ORDER BY s.AvgScrRead DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM satscores s
JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.NumTstTakr > 0 AND s.AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY s.AvgScrRead DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.AvgScrRead = (
    SELECT MAX(AvgScrRead)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
)
LIMIT 1;

SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.AvgScrRead = (
    SELECT MAX(AvgScrRead)
    FROM satscores
);

SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM satscores s
JOIN frpm f ON s.cds = f.CDSCode
WHERE s.rtype = 'S'
ORDER BY s.AvgScrRead DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT f."FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)"
FROM frpm f
JOIN satscores s ON f.CDSCode = s.cds
WHERE s.AvgScrRead = (
    SELECT MAX(AvgScrRead)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE AvgScrRead IS NOT NULL
)
LIMIT 1;
